definitions.text: Of whom, belonging to whom; which person's or people's.
examples: We should buy a house. ~ With whose money?
This is the man whose dog caused the accident.
Venus, whose sister is Serena, won the latest championship.
We saw several houses whose roofs were falling off.

definitions.text: That or those of whom or belonging to whom.
examples: Several people have lost their suitcases. Whose have you found?
He asked whose the umbrella was.

definitions.text: That or those of whom or belonging to whom.
examples: This car is blocking the way, but Mr Smith, whose it is, will be here shortly.
